Deleted User 28-Jul-18 07:42 PM
Welcome to #staff-wages, where VoCo Staff can "redeem" how active they've been over the past week, and any progress they've made on their respective projects for VoCoin™ This will serve as a Staff payment system until VoCoin™ wages are implemented (if ever). (edited)
